_comment: Hand-curated events for sources we cannot scrape, OR archival lectures preserved on the seminars page beyond their date. To add: append an entry to the 'events' array following the _example_schema. The fetcher reads only the 'events' array; other keys (_comment, _example_schema) are ignored.

_example_schema.source_id: MUST match a source id in scripts/sources.json
_example_schema.date: ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset. Example: 2026-06-15T18:00:00-04:00
_example_schema.title: Event title in front-facing plain language. Example: Annette Baier Memorial Lecture on Humean Sentimentalism
_example_schema.venue: Full venue with address if useful. Example: Jackman Humanities Building, 170 St. George St., Toronto
_example_schema.type: One of: lecture, reading, panel, screening, artist-talk, scholar-talk, philosophy-cafe, gathering, other
_example_schema.speaker_or_director: Optional. Name of the speaker, author, or director.
_example_schema.source_url: Optional. URL to the original event listing.
_example_schema.attendance_confirmed: Optional boolean. For screenings, true means filmmaker is present for Q and A.
_example_schema.description: Optional. Brief description shown in the RSS feed item body.

events.title: Rebecca Comay on Mourning Sickness
events.venue: University of Toronto Department of Comparative Literature
events.description: Hand-curated lecture. Comay on melancholia, mourning, and the dialectic of grief as developed in Mourning Sickness: Hegel and the French Revolution.

events.title: TPL Salon Series at Appel Salon
events.venue: Toronto Reference Library, Appel Salon, 789 Yonge Street

events.title: Cheryl Misak on Frank Ramsey
events.venue: University of Toronto Department of Philosophy
events.description: Hand-curated lecture. Misak on Frank Ramsey, the Cambridge philosopher whose biography she wrote (Frank Ramsey: A Sheer Excess of Powers, Oxford 2020).

events.title: Ian Hacking Memorial Symposium
events.description: Memorial symposium for Ian Hacking, the late philosopher of science.

events.title: ROM Speaks on archaeology and memory
events.venue: Royal Ontario Museum, 100 Queens Park, Toronto
events.description: ROM Speaks public lecture series, theme: archaeology and memory.

events.title: Ethics@Noon-ish weekly talk
events.venue: Centre for Ethics, University of Toronto, Larkin Building, 15 Devonshire Place
events.description: Weekly Ethics@Noon-ish series. The Centre for Ethics workhorse seminar.

events.title: Jackman Humanities Annual Lecture
events.venue: Jackman Humanities Institute, 170 St. George Street, Toronto
events.description: Annual lecture of the Jackman Humanities Institute.
